markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off content strategy engagement between Engine.com and GrowthX, focusing on accelerating organic growth and content production.](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Engine.com primarily serves blue-collar, project-based industries (construction, manufacturing, transportation) with discounted hotel bookings and travel management.](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Current organic traffic is minimal; goal is to reach 100 high-quality first-time bookings (FTBs) from organic content monthly within 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=3625.0)
  - [Strategy will focus on verticalizing content, balancing volume and quality, and exploring both blue-collar and potential white-collar use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide strategic guidance on content production, SEO optimization, and leveraging Engine's unique market position.](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)

## Topics

### Engine.com Business Overview

  - [Spun out of Travelers Haven, focusing on direct hotel relationships](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Offers 20-30% discounts off public rates for business travelers](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [Primary customers: SMB and mid-market, blue-collar, project-based industries](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Revenue model: Take-rate based on margin between hotel rates and resale price](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [Multiple products: Core travel platform, Groups booking, Partner hub for hotels, upcoming Charge Card](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)

### Target Audience and Use Cases

  - [Primary users: Operations managers, finance/accounting, travel admins in blue-collar industries](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=2183.0)
  - [Key verticals: Construction, manufacturing, transportation, logistics, energy, utilities](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Specific use cases: Disaster relief, corporate offsites, weddings (via Groups product)](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [80% of customers don't have existing travel management solutions](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=3097.0)
  - [50% close rate from discovery call to first-time booking](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=3112.0)

### Content Strategy Challenges and Opportunities

  - [Current content mostly upper-funnel, educational, with limited direct conversions](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=3362.0)
  - [Recent focus on AI-generated overviews, but engagement metrics are unclear](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=3381.0)
  - [Opportunity to shift towards more targeted, vertical-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=3374.0)
  - [Potential to explore white-collar use cases (e.g., startup offsites) for diversification](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=3467.0)
  - [Need for higher volume content production while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)

### SEO and Traffic Goals

  - [Current organic traffic and conversions are minimal](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=3252.0)
  - [Aim for 100 high-quality FTBs from organic content monthly within 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=3625.0)
  - [Recent launch of 7,000 programmatic SEO pages, but indexing challenges exist](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=2507.0)
  - [GrowthX recommends a more measured approach to page launches and indexing](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=2513.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Main alternatives: Traditional Travel Management Companies (TMCs), not direct competitors](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=3055.0)
  - [Engine.com serves smaller businesses often overlooked by larger TMCs](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=3060.0)
  - [Unique value proposition: No contracts, easier onboarding for SMBs](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=1870.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send list of requested assets and data](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Engine.com to provide access to analytics and Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=3789.0)
  - [Schedule deep dive on current publishing process with Emmanuel (Webflow Dev)](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=3799.0)
  - [GrowthX to formulate initial hypotheses and strategy based on provided information](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=3854.0)
  - [Coordinate recurring meetings and Slack communication for ongoing collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=3854.0)
  - [Explore ways to leverage call data and pain points for content ideation, respecting NDAs and data privacy](https://fathom.video/share/5hExoKV75eMmtxCC45hp4ziwSw5xj5sy?tab=summary&timestamp=3927.0)
